mapper.select: select va.id, va.appointment_time, va.appointment_status, ai.id as apartment_id, ai.name as apartment_name from view_appointment va left join apartment_info ai on va.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 where user_id = #{userId} and va.is_deleted = 0
select name, url from graph_info where item_id = #{apartment_id} and is_deleted = 0 and item_type = 1
select id, user_id, name, phone, apartment_id, appointment_time, additional_info, appointment_status, is_deleted from view_appointment where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
